title: Crypsinus hellwigii
taxonomy: Crypsinus hellwigii is classified as a species within the plant family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. This classification places Crypsinus hellwigii in the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, encompassing all vascular plants. Further classification at the phylum level places Crypsinus hellwigii in the phylum Pteridophyta, indicating its fern-like characteristics. Within the genus, Crypsinus hellwigii is a distinct species, often recognized by its unique growth habits and distribution.
